statement: In every magma, Equation 517 (`x = y * (y * (y * (z * y)))`) implies Equation 3301 (`x * x = y * (z * (w * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0862
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op y (op z y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op z (op w y)))
